hero.title: Hybrid Car Repair in Chisinau
hero.subtitle: Diagnostics and repair of batteries, inverters, and high-voltage systems. We handle complex cases where other services failed.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions and Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit
faq.a1: The cost depends on the complexity of the problem. The exact price is clarified after an initial inspection.
faq.q2: How long does the repair take?
faq.a2: From a few hours to several days depending on complexity.
faq.a3: Yes, we provide a warranty on all completed work.
faq.q4: Do you work with Toyota hybrids?
faq.a4: Yes, we specialize in Toyota and Lexus hybrids, including Prius, Camry, RAV4, and the entire line of hybrid models.
faq.a5: Our service is located at: Chisinau, Grenoble 7 str. We look forward to seeing you!
